snippet.title: KLARA AND THE SUN – Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
Meet Klara. Your new best (artificial) friend. 🌞

Jenna Ortega is Klara in Director Taika Waititi’s adaptation of Kazuo Ishiguro’s #KlaraAndTheSun - coming exclusively to theatres October 23. Watch the trailer now.

KLARA AND THE SUN

Comedy/Drama

October 23, 2026
Based on the bestselling novel from Nobel Prize-winner Kazuo Ishiguro and written and directed by Academy-Award® winner Taika Waititi (Jojo Rabbit), Klara and the Sun introduces audiences to Klara (Jenna Ortega), an Artificial Friend who wants nothing more than to find the perfect home. When Klara meets Josie (Mia Tharia), each immediately senses a kindred spirit in the other. Josie has a fraught relationship with her mother (Amy Adams) and they’ve suffered great loss, but Klara’s innocent wonder and unwavering loyalty begin to heal the family and bring light to Josie’s complicated world.
 
Directed by:​​​​​
Taika Waititi
 
Screenplay by:​​​​
Taika Waititi and Dahvi Waller
 
Based on the book by:​​​
Kazuo Ishiguro
 
Produced by: ​​​​​
David Heyman, p.g.a.
Garrett Basch, p.g.a.
Taika Waititi, p.g.a.
 
Executive Producers:​​​​
Gary Barber
​​​​​​Alex G. Scott
​​​​​​Jeffrey Clifford
Rosie Alison
Kazuo Ishiguro
 
Cast: ​​​​​​
Jenna Ortega
​​​​​​Amy Adams
Mia Tharia
Aran Murphy​
with Steve Buscemi
and Natasha Lyonne
 
This film is rated PG-13 by The Motion Picture Association for the following reasons: thematic elements, some violence and strong language.

snippet.description:
SUPPORT US and GET A CUSTOM STEAM MACHINE FRONT PANEL: https://store.gamersnexus.net/products/custom-steam-machine-front-panel-airflow-upgrade-with-dust-filter and consider a Retro IO Coaster Pack while you're at it: https://store.gamersnexus.net/products/gn-drink-retro-io-coaster-pack-4-custom-3d-coasters-100x100mm
The Valve Steam Machine runs desktop SteamOS, a Linux distribution, and ships in a console-like form factor with the intent for use as a living room PC or mini PC. The Machine ships at $1050 for a 512GB model and $1350 for a 2TB model, so we have DIY PC price comparisons included. Our testing of the Steam Machine benchmarks gaming performance, GPU performance, framerate (FPS), CPU performance, compression and decompression, thermals, acoustics, and more. We also look at SteamOS in-depth and at BIOS, power draw, and more in our in-depth Steam Machine review.

snippet.title: CG5 - Not Supposed To Love Me [Ode to JAX] (The Amazing Digital Circus Song Animation)
snippet.description:
STREAM "Not Supposed To Love Me" NOW ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/NotSupposedToLoveMe

Song by @CG5
Animation by @CodaAnim
Guitars by @FamilyJules7X

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5covers107, & @cg5instrumentals461
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

I’ve abandoned hope,
Looking for something that was real.
I’ll try not to think about it,
I don’t want to feel.
Cuz it’s all just too much to carry.
It’s all much too wrong.
I’ve lived in levity so long.

I'm forever haunted by the choices that I made.
A weight beyond imagining that never seems to fade.
For every scar I've left behind comes back to me in waves.
I run from love, I run away.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

Family fell apart, made me feel like I was weak.
So I cut them from my life, my feelings buried far beneath.
No, I do not deserve to be forgiven of my sins.
Shut up and leave me in ruins.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

You’re making this so hard.
Won’t let me disappear.
Somehow you see me in the dark.
Too long I lived in fear, now it’s too late.
No I don’t want to go,
But I chose my own fate,
I hate you, but you’ll still miss me.

So thank you everyone,
Whoever tried to help me.
After all that’s said and done,
You held me close, and made me understand.
But I’ll never come back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.

snippet.title: Journey - Don't Stop Believin' (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Journey - Don't Stop Believin' (Traducción al Español / Sub. Español / Letra + Lyrics)
Fecha de lanzamiento: 06/10/1981

🎶 "Don't stop believin', hold on to that feelin'"

Traducción al español y subtitulado por Leo + The Pears.

📌 Video oficial de "Don't Stop Believin'":
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1k8craCGpgs

📌 No olvides seguir a Journey:
Spotify: https://Journey.lnk.to/followSI
Sitio Web: https://Journey.lnk.to/followWI

“Don't Stop Believin'” es una canción que habla sobre personas comunes persiguiendo sus sueños, buscando esperanza, emoción y un mejor futuro en medio de las dificultades de la vida.

#Journey #DontStopBelievin #Rock #Pop #Lyrics #LetrasDeCanciones

Gracias por ver. Espero que hayas disfrutado esta canción subtitulada.  
Si te gustó, comparte, deja tu like, hypea el video y comenta para apoyar el canal 🧡🍐

🎶 Letra original de "Don't Stop Believin'":
[Verse 1]
Just a small-town girl, livin' in a lonely world
She took the midnight train goin' anywhere
Just a city boy, born and raised in South Detroit
He took the midnight train goin' anywhere

[Verse 2]
A singer in a smoky room
The smell of wine and cheap perfume
For a smile, they can share the night
It goes on and on and on and on

[Chorus]
Strangers waitin'
Up and down the boulevard
Their shadows searchin' in the night
Streetlight people
Livin' just to find emotion
Hidin' somewhere in the night

[Verse 3]
Workin' hard to get my fill
Everybody wants a thrill
Payin' anything to roll the dice
Just one more time

[Verse 4]
Some will win, some will lose
Some are born to sing the blues
Oh, the movie never ends
It goes on and on and on and on

[Chorus]
Strangers waitin'
Up and down the boulevard
Their shadows searchin' in the night
Streetlight people
Livin' just to find emotion
Hidin' somewhere in the night

[Guitar Solo]

[Outro]
Don't stop believin'
Hold on to that feelin'
Streetlight people
Don't stop believin'
Hold on
Streetlight people
Don't stop believin'
Hold on to that feelin'
Streetlight people
